title: stevia bertholdii
intro: Stevia bertholdii, also known as the Paraguayan stevia or sweet stevia, is a plant species within the Stevia genus, native to the subtropical regions of South America. The medicinal properties of Stevia bertholdii include its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for infections and wounds. The health benefits of consuming Stevia bertholdii leaves include its potential to lower blood pressure, aid in weight management, and provide antioxidant properties. Stevia bertholdii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
